allow: Bash(node -e "const { z } = require\('zod'\); const s = z.object\({ a: z.string\(\) }\); console.log\('_zod' in s, '_def' in s, Object.keys\(s\).slice\(0,10\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const { z } = require\('zod'\); const s = z.object\({ a: z.string\(\) }\); console.log\('_def:', JSON.stringify\(s._def, null, 2\).slice\(0, 200\)\); console.log\('_zod type:', typeof s._zod\)")
